clientImpact: Successful credential stuffing could allow adversary to impersonate legitimate users and access production workloads. Current MFA posture partially mitigates but rate-limiting gaps remain exploitable.
recommendedActions: Enforce adaptive rate limiting on /auth/token endpoint (max 10 req/min per IP)
Enable step-up MFA for logins originating from anonymous proxy ranges
Rotate all service-account credentials issued before 2026-06-01
